topic: The HR manager who finally stopped processing leave requests on WhatsApp — what changed in week one
format: Tight case study: company profile, problem, what changed, the one number that proves it worked
post:
47 leave requests in one month. All on WhatsApp. None tracked.

That was the reality for an HR manager at a 60-person trading company in Muscat. No system, no paper trail — just a group chat where requests got buried between supplier invoices and weekend plans.

Week one on SmartPRO Hub changed three things:

Employees submitted leave through a self-service portal. The manager approved or declined in one tap. Oman-compliant records were auto-generated — no manual logging.

The number that actually mattered: 0 missed requests by end of week one. Down from an average of 6 per month falling through the cracks.

No chaser messages. No "did you see my request?" conversations. No end-of-month scramble to figure out who took what.

SmartPRO Hub replaces the patchwork — WhatsApp threads, spreadsheets, disconnected vendor tools — with one bilingual platform built for Oman and GCC businesses. HR, WPS payroll, work permit tracking, SPF compliance, all connected. Starting at OMR 12/month.

One question worth sitting with: how many requests fell through last month that you still don't know about?

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
